title: New Article by Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban from the Department of Communication Sciences Published in an International Special Issue
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 13 February 2026

New Article by Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban from the Department of Communication Sciences Published in an International Special Issue

The article entitled “Mediation of Gendered Life and Death Within Intersecting Regimes of Patriarchy, Authoritarianism, and Necropolitics,” co-authored by Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban, a faculty member of our University’s Department of Communication Sciences, and Melike İşleyen, has been published in the special issue “Death Notice/Body Copy: Representations of Death in Global Journalism.” Access: https://www.cogitatiopress.com/mediaandcommunication/issue/view/495
